description.en: The Fool, Mate, or Unwise Man. Court de Gebelin places it at the head of the whole series as the zero or negative which is presupposed by numeration. The Fool carries a wallet; he is looking over his shoulder and does not know that he is on the brink of a precipice ; but a dog or other animal is attacking him from behind. He signifies the journey outward, the state of the first emanation, the graces and passivity of the spirit.
description.zh-CN: 他是追寻经验的灵魂,一位身着华服的流浪者 。他背对过去,无忧无虑地停驻在悬崖边缘,凝视着远方未知的虚空 。他手中的白玫瑰象征着尚未被欲望沾染的纯洁,肩上的行囊则装满了未经开发的无限潜能 。他是另一世界的王子,象征着向外旅程、第一次发出的状态,以及精神的优雅与被动 。

upright.en: Starting from zero; luck in gambling; unconventionality; pursuit of novel dreams; adventure; uninhibited living; an artist's temperament; out of the ordinary; striking directly at the key point or blind spot; a hunter in love; transcendent spiritual love; free love unconstrained by form
upright.zh-CN: 从零开始; 好赌运; 不墨守成规; 追求新奇的梦想; 冒险; 放浪形骸; 艺术家的气质; 异于常人; 直攻要害、盲点; 爱情狩猎者; 精神上的超然之爱; 不拘形式的自由恋爱

reversed.en: Instability; reckless gambles ending in failure; lack of responsibility; loss; unsteady footing; degeneration; taking the wrong path; eccentric behavior; frivolous romance; hot-and-cold feelings; an unstable journey in love; negligence; emptiness; vanity
reversed.zh-CN: 不安定; 孤注一掷会失败; 缺乏责任感; 损失; 脚跟站不稳; 堕落; 走错路; 行为乖张; 轻浮的恋情; 感情忽冷忽热; 不安定的爱情之旅; 疏忽; 虚无; 虚荣

description.en: The Magus, Magician, or juggler. The figure represents the divine motive in man, reflecting God, the will in the liberation of the union with that which is above. He is the channel of the grace from on high, implying that the powers of the elements are subject to the initiated will. He is also the unity of individual being on all planes.
description.zh-CN: 他身着象征行动的红袍,一手高举权杖指天,一手指地,以此昭示赫尔墨斯学派“如在其上,如在其下”的奥义 。他不仅是技艺精湛的术士,更是意志的化身,也是连结神性与物质世界的通道 。头顶上方悬浮着代表永恒的双纽线符号(∞),腰间缠绕着象征智慧的吞尾蛇 。在他面前的祭坛上,陈列着圣杯、宝剑、权杖与星币,代表构成物质世界的四要素 。他以此告诫世人:通过专注的意志与神圣的知识,人类拥有将精神能量显化为现实奇迹的能力。

upright.en: A good beginning; originality; growth potential; success for a new plan; rich imagination or good ideas; the start of a romance; a well-matched partner; the arrival of a new lover; someone worthy of emulation appears; skill; diplomacy; address; subtlety; confidence; will
upright.zh-CN: 好的开始; 具独创性; 有发展的; 新计划成功; 想像力丰富或有好点子; 有恋情发生; 拥有默契良好的伴侣; 有新恋人出现; 值得效仿的对象出现; 技能; 外交; 地址; 微妙; 自信; 意志

description.en: The High Priestess, the Pope Joan, or Female Pontiff. She is the Secret Tradition and the higher sense of the instituted Mysteries. She represents the spiritual Bride and Mother, the Queen of the Borrowed Light, but this is the light of all. She is seated between the white and black pillars—J. and B.—of the mystic Temple.
description.zh-CN: 她端坐于黑白双柱(J和B)之间,象征着二元对立中的完美平衡 。她身后的帷幕上绣着棕榈与石榴,遮蔽着凡人不可直视的深层真理 。她头戴有角的月冠,脚踏新月,胸前有太阳十字 ,手中紧握神秘卷轴“Tora”,那是神圣律法的象征 。她是通往隐秘智慧的守门人 ,代表着直觉、潜意识以及那寂静之中流淌的灵性之光。她的最高阶名字是 Shekinah,象征内住的荣耀 。

upright.zh-CN: 知性、优秀的判断力; 具洞察力及先见之明; 强大的战斗意志; 冷静的统率力; 学问、研究等精神方面幸运; 独立自主的女性; 柏拉图式的爱情; 有心灵上交往至深的友人; 冷淡的恋情; 秘密; 奥秘; 智慧; 科学; 沉默; 坚韧

description.en: The Empress, the inferior Garden of Eden, the Earthly Paradise. Her diadem is of twelve stars. The symbol of Venus is on the shield. She is above all things universal fecundity and the outer sense of the Word.
description.zh-CN: 她是众生之母,是大自然丰饶力量的崇高化身 。在她面前,谷物正在成熟,远处瀑布奔流,象征着物质世界的繁荣与生机 。她手中的权杖高举地球仪,头戴由十二颗星辰组成的冠冕 ,脚下的盾牌刻有维纳斯的符号 。她是通往尘世天堂的大门 ,代表着普遍的丰饶、感官之美以及滋养万物之母 。

upright.zh-CN: 母性本能强; 富创造力; 事业有成; 生活富足; 感情充实; 美好的恋情; 受人爱戴的对象; 有结婚的机会; 温柔体贴的伴侣; 多产; 行动; 主动性; 长久

description.en: The Emperor. He is the executive and realization, the power of this world, here clothed with the highest of its natural attributes. He has a form of the Crux ansata for his sceptre and a globe in his left hand. He is the virile power, and in this sense is he who seeks to remove the Veil of Isis.
description.zh-CN: 他是世俗权力的顶峰,端坐于饰有公羊头骨的石座之上 。他手持安卡十字权杖与金球,在此展现绝对的统治与秩序 。他是雄性的力量,是行政与实现,代表了人类最高的自然属性 。在这个充满变数的世界中,他是坚定的建立者与守护者,以理性和威严确立疆界 。

upright.en: Success through strong will and capable methods; wealth and power; responsibility; strong executive ability; leadership; masculine reasoning; perseverance to the end; somewhat authoritarian yet trustworthy; an attractive marriage proposal; romance with an older person; stability; strength; protection; realization; help; reason; conviction; authority and will

description.en: The Hierophant, or Pope. He wears the triple crown and is seated between two pillars. In his left hand he holds a sceptre terminating in the triple cross. He is the ruling power of external religion, as the High Priestess is the prevailing genius of the esoteric, withdrawn power. He is the channel of grace belonging to the world of institution.
description.zh-CN: 他头戴三重冠冕,手持三重十字权杖 ,象征着他在身、心、灵三个层面的至高权威。他做出手势,区分了显性与隐秘的教义 。两把交叉的钥匙置于脚下 。教皇代表着显性的教义、社会规范与外部宗教的统治力量 。他是传统的守护者,指引人们通过既定的仪式与信仰体系,在群体中寻求精神上的归属与救赎 。

description.en: The Lovers or Marriage. The sun shines in the zenith, and beneath is a great winged figure with hands extended, pouring down influences. The figures suggest youth, virginity, innocence and love before it is contaminated by gross material desire. This is the card of human love, here exhibited as part of the way, the truth and the life.
description.zh-CN: 骄阳高悬于天顶,天使拉斐尔张开双臂,以超然的姿态庇护着下方的亚当与夏娃 。男人身后是燃烧着十二团火焰的生命之树,女人身后则是缠绕着蛇的智慧之树 。这不仅是人类之爱的象征 ,更是纯真与诱惑并存的伊甸园景象。它象征着意识与潜意识的统一,以及在道德的路口上,人类出于自由意志所做出的神圣抉择——那是关于爱、美、以及自我整合的试炼 。

description.en: The Chariot. An erect and princely figure carrying a drawn sword. Two sphinxes thus draw his chariot. He is conquest on all planes—in the mind, in science, in progress. He is above all things triumph in the mind.
description.zh-CN: 威严的王子驾驭着战车,背对繁华的城池,踏上征途 。他无需缰绳,仅凭强大的意志力便能驾驭黑白两头斯芬克斯 。这是心灵层面的征服,象征着以自律、决心与勇气,战胜内在的矛盾与外在的障碍 。他是胜利中的国王,代表创造王权的胜利 。

description.en: Strength or Fortitude. A woman is closing the jaws of a lion. Over her head there hovers the same symbol of life as we see in the card of the Magician. The card connects with the Divine Mystery of Union. The figure signifies strength in its conventional understanding, and conveys the idea of mastery.
description.zh-CN: 一位女子温柔地抚摸着狮子的头颅,甚至轻合它的利齿 。她头顶悬浮着代表无限的符号(双纽线),腰间缠绕着鲜花 。这并非暴力的征服,而是以柔克刚的最高典范,象征着内在力量与仁慈的坚韧 。它代表着更高本性的解放,与神圣原则相通 。

description.en: The Hermit. The figure is seen holding up his beacon on an eminence. His lamp contains the Light of Occult Science. It is a card of attainment rather than a card of quest. It signifies the truth that the Divine Mysteries secure their own protection from those who are unprepared.
description.zh-CN: 他独自立于冰雪覆盖的山巅,身披斗篷 。他右手高举一盏明灯,内藏熠熠生辉的六芒星,象征真理与灵性的光芒 。隐士是向内探索的先行者,是“成就之牌”而非“追寻之牌” 。他所持的灯塔暗示着:“我所在之处,亦有你可至” 。其形象象征神圣奥秘会自我保护,不受未经准备的人侵犯 。

description.en: The Wheel of Fortune. The wheel has seven radii. The symbolism stands for the perpetual motion of a fluidic universe and for the flux of human life. The Sphinx is the equilibrium therein. The transliteration of Taro as Rota is inscribed on the wheel, counterchanged with the letters of the Divine Name.
description.zh-CN: 巨大的轮盘悬于苍穹,轮辐上刻有神名(TARO/ROTA)与炼金术符号 。斯芬克斯端坐顶端,手持利剑,象征着即使在变动中也要保持平衡 。赫尔墨斯-阿努比斯随轮上升,泰风巨蛇随轮下降 。这象征着流体宇宙的永恒运动与人类生命的无常 ,但也否认了其中所暗示的偶然性 。

description.en: Justice. The figure is seated between pillars, like the High Priestess. It is the moral principle which deals unto every man according to his works. Its presentation is supposed to be one of the four cardinal virtues. The figure holds a sword and a pair of scales.
description.zh-CN: 她端坐于石柱之间,右手高举利剑,左手持天平 。这象征着道德原则,根据每个人的行为给予报偿 。她代表绝对的公平与精神的真理。正义之柱通向一个世界,而女祭司之柱则通向另一个世界 。

upright.en: Justice; strict and proper opinions; balanced relationships; firm neutrality; rationality in all things; holding two jobs; a mediator; someone connected to judges or the law; a fair person consistent inside and out; honest and upright dealings; mutual harmony; fairness; integrity; victory in law for the side that deserves it
upright.zh-CN: 公正; 严正的意见; 良好的均衡关系; 严守中立立场; 凡事合理化; 身兼两种工作; 协调者; 与裁判、法律相关者; 表里一致的公正人物; 以诚实之心光明正大地交往; 彼此能获得协调; 公平; 正直; 法律中应得一方的胜利

reversed.en: Injustice; imbalance; unfavorable conditions; bias; preconceived notions; prejudice and arbitrariness; disputes and lawsuits; a guilty conscience; inability to satisfy both sides; scales that cannot be balanced; inconsistency of character; a romance ignoring social morality; favoritism; legal disputes; prejudice; bias; excessive severity
reversed.zh-CN: 不公正; 不平衡; 不利的条件; 偏颇; 先入为主的观念; 偏见与独断; 纷争、诉讼; 问心有愧; 无法两全; 天平两边无法平衡; 性格不一致; 无视于社会道德观的恋情; 偏爱; 法律纠纷; 偏执; 偏见; 过度严厉

description.en: The Hanged Man. The gallows from which he is suspended forms a Tau cross, while the figure--from the position of the legs--forms a fylfot cross. The face expresses deep entrancement, not suffering. He expresses the relation, in one of its aspects, between the Divine and the Universe.
description.zh-CN: 他以倒吊的姿态悬挂于T形树枝之上,这树是活着的木头,长着新叶 。他的双腿交织成十字,双臂背于身后 。他的面容宁静安详,头周闪耀着代表灵性的光环 。这象征着生命处于暂停状态,但不是死亡 。它表达了神性与宇宙的关系 ,预示着在神圣的静止中孕育出的伟大觉醒 。

upright.en: Accepting trials; unable to move; being sacrificed; loss followed by gain; lessons gained through painful experience; a transitional period; not grasping for immediate profit; rebirth through fire; devoted love; giving one's all despite knowing the hardship; wisdom; caution; insight; trial; sacrifice; intuition; prophecy
upright.zh-CN: 接受考验; 无法动弹; 被牺牲; 有失必有得; 从痛苦的体验中获得教训; 过度期; 不贪图眼前利益; 浴火重生; 奉献的爱; 明知辛苦但全力以赴; 智慧; 小心; 洞察力; 考验; 牺牲; 直觉; 预言

reversed.en: Meaningless sacrifice; broken bones; bad luck and a disadvantaged position; willful recklessness; lack of effort; growing impatient; selfishness; punishment; unpaid or unrewarded love; lack of a partner willing to struggle together; self-interest; the crowd; political groups
reversed.zh-CN: 无谓的牺牲; 折断骨头; 有噩运、居于劣势; 任性妄为; 不努力; 变得没有耐性; 利己主义者; 受到惩罚; 无偿的爱; 缺乏共同奋斗的伙伴; 自私; 人群; 政治团体

description.en: Death. The veil or mask of life is perpetuated in change, transformation and passage from lower to higher. The horseman bears a black banner emblazoned with the Mystic Rose, which signifies life. King and child and maiden fall before him. It is not the path to the next stage of being, but a mysterious entrance into the state of mystical death.
description.zh-CN: 神秘的骑士骑着马,举着一面印有象征生命的神秘玫瑰的黑旗,象征着生命 。在他面前,世俗的国王、孩子和少女都倒下了 。这不是普通死亡,而是从低阶向高阶的转化 。在远方的双塔之间,一轮不朽的太阳正在升起 。

upright.en: Failure; the day of destruction drawing near; damage continuing; unemployment; stalled progress; halted transactions; too late; stagnation; signs of illness or accident; a dull and tasteless life; an unfortunate romance; the end of a relationship; a deep gulf between two people; parting; ending; mortality; destruction; decay
upright.zh-CN: 失败; 毁灭之日将近; 损害继续延续; 失业; 进展停滞; 交易停止; 为时已晚; 停滞状态; 生病或意外的暗示; 味如嚼蜡的生活; 不幸的恋情; 恋情终止; 彼此间有很深的鸿沟; 别离; 终结; 死亡率; 破坏; 腐败

reversed.en: A chance to come back to life; emerging from a slump; changing impressions; changing one's heart and starting again; recovering one's reputation; miraculous recovery; a sudden change of direction; a dead matter turning around; cutting emotional ties and starting over; inertia; sleep; drowsiness; shattered hope
reversed.zh-CN: 起死回生的机会; 脱离低迷期; 改变印象; 回心转意再出发; 挽回名誉; 奇迹似地康复; 突然改变方针; 已经死心 的事有了转机; 斩断情丝,重新出发; 惯性; 睡眠; 嗜睡; 希望破灭

description.en: Temperance. A winged angel (neither male nor female)  with the sign of the sun upon his forehead. It is held to be pouring the essences of life from chalice to chalice. The figure has one foot upon the earth and one upon waters. It is called Temperance fantastically, because, when the rule of it obtains in our consciousness, it tempers, combines and harmonises the psychic and material natures.
description.zh-CN: 一位长有双翼的天使(无性别区分),额头闪耀着太阳的印记 。他一只脚踏入水中,一只脚立于大地,双手稳健地将生命之精粹在两只圣杯间倾倒与调和 。这象征着心理和物质本性的调和 ,其规则一旦在意识中建立,便能通晓源头与归宿 。这并非字面意义上的节制,而是深层的平衡之道 。

upright.en: Simplification; smooth progress; harmonious relations; two sides blending well; adjustment; exchanging favorable conditions with each other; important opportunities even in the ordinary; a peaceful state of mind; pure love; affection developing into love; deep love; saving; moderation; frugality; management
upright.zh-CN: 单纯化; 顺畅; 交往平顺; 两者相融顺畅; 调整; 彼此交换有利条件; 平凡中也有重要的契机; 平顺的心境; 纯爱; 从好感转为爱意; 深爱; 节约; 适度; 节俭; 管理

reversed.en: Depletion; fatigue; unstable work; lack of ability to adjust; decline; waste; do not cooperate with others; disharmony; poor compatibility in love; matters related to church, religion, or priests; separation; competing interests
reversed.zh-CN: 消耗; 疲劳; 不定性的工作; 缺乏调整能力; 下降; 浪费; 不要与人合作; 不融洽; 爱情的配合度不佳; 与教会、宗教、祭司相关的事物; 分离; 相互竞争的利益

description.en: The Devil. The Horned Goat of Mendes, with wings like those of a bat, is standing on an altar. A reversed pentagram is on the forehead. The male and female figures are analogous with those of the fifth card (Hierophant), as if Adam and Eve after the Fall. Hereof is the chain and fatality of the material life.
description.zh-CN: 巨大的巴风特(有山羊头和蝙蝠翼)蹲伏于祭坛之上,头顶倒五芒星 。他左手持燃烧的火炬倒向地面,右手做出虚假的手势 。被铁链束缚的一男一女立于其下,象征着物质生命的枷锁与宿命 。它代表着“门槛上的居住者”——在神秘花园外,诱惑并奴役着那些吃下禁果的人 。

upright.en: Being bound; degeneration; the devil's whisper; servility; a prisoner of desire; a wasted life; living in debt; illness invading; too much nightlife; secret matters; malice; irresistible temptation; a hidden affair; indulgence in sensual stimulation; violation; violence; intensity; force; fatality
upright.zh-CN: 被束缚; 堕落; 恶魔的私语; 卑躬屈膝; 欲望的俘虏; 荒废的生活; 举债度日; 病魔入侵; 夜游过多; 不可告人的事; 恶意; 不可抗拒的诱惑; 私密恋情; 沉溺于感官刺激之下; 蹂躏; 暴力; 激烈; 力量; 宿命

reversed.en: Escaping restraints; long suffering being released; cutting ties with the past; getting over difficulties; a temporary halt; rejecting temptation; abandoning selfish desire; healing chronic illness; a moment of parting; a love affair sunk in the mire of love and hate; evil fate; weakness; triviality; blindness
reversed.zh-CN: 逃离拘束; 长期的苦恼获得解放; 斩断前缘; 越过难关; 暂时停止; 拒绝诱惑; 舍弃私欲; 治愈长期病痛; 别离时刻; 如深陷泥沼爱恨交加的恋情; 邪恶的宿命; 软弱; 琐碎; 盲目

description.en: The Tower struck by Lightning. Its alternative titles are: Castle of Plutus, God's House and the Tower of Babel. It is assuredly a card of confusion. The tower has been spoken of as the chastisement of pride and the intellect overwhelmed in the attempt to penetrate the Mystery of God. It is a card in particular of unforeseen catastrophe.
description.zh-CN: 一道闪电击中了高耸的石塔,两名人物从塔顶坠落 。这被称为“上帝之屋”或“巴别塔” 。它象征着建立在错误基础上的结构崩塌 。它是一张混乱之牌,代表着对骄傲的惩罚 ,以及知识层面上的毁灭 。

upright.en: A fatal blow; strife; endless disputes; conflict with one's surroundings and worsening circumstances; unexpected events; sudden illness; being implicated; abrupt major change; collapse of belief; adversity; bankruptcy; sudden separation without warning; shattered love; playing with fire and getting burned; pain; hardship; poverty; adversity; disaster; disgrace; deception; destruction
upright.zh-CN: 致命的打击; 纷争; 纠纷不断; 与周遭事物对立,情况恶化; 意想不到的事情; 急病; 受牵连; 急剧的大变动; 信念奔溃; 逆境; 破产; 没有预警,突然分离; 破灭的爱; 玩火自焚; 痛苦; 困苦; 贫困; 逆境; 灾难; 耻辱; 欺骗; 毁灭

reversed.en: A pressing situation; a sinister atmosphere; internal conflict; impending collapse; urgent problems requiring resolution; enduring shock; making a last stand; beware of criminal issues; painful consequences for pride and arrogance; poor conditions; distress; a love crisis; foreboding of separation; oppression; imprisonment; tyranny
reversed.zh-CN: 紧迫的状态; 险恶的气氛; 内讧; 即将破灭; 急需解决的问题; 承受震撼; 背水一战; 注意刑事问题; 因骄傲自大将付出惨痛的代价; 状况不佳; 困境; 爱情危机; 分离的预感; 压迫; 监禁; 暴政

description.en: The Star. A great, radiant star of eight rays, surrounded by seven lesser stars. The female figure is entirely naked. She pours Water of Life from two great ewers, irrigating sea and land. It is the card of hope, of immortality and interior light.
description.zh-CN: 一位赤裸的女子,单膝跪在水边,将两壶生命之水倾倒,滋润着水和大地 。天空中,一颗巨大的八芒星被七颗小星环绕 。她是“被揭开的真理”,其座右铭是“自由的生命之水”和“精神的恩赐” 。她象征着希望、永恒的青春与不朽的美丽 。

upright.en: Wishes fulfilled; a bright future; a hopeful tomorrow; a beautiful life; the first light of dawn; bold imagination; rising standards; new creativity; imagination; an ideal partner; a beautiful romance; love beginning to sprout; hopeful and bright prospects
upright.zh-CN: 愿望达成; 前途光明; 充满希望的未来; 美好的生活; 曙光出现; 大胆的幻想; 水准提高; 新的创造力; 想像力; 理想的对象; 美好的恋情; 爱苗滋生; 希望和光明的前景

reversed.en: Setbacks and failure; ideals set too high; lack of imagination; unrealistic fantasy; things turning out against one's wishes; disappointment; doing work one dislikes; loss; theft; deprivation; abandonment; arrogance; pride; incompetence
reversed.zh-CN: 挫折、失败; 理想过高; 缺乏想像力; 异想天开; 事与愿违; 失望; 从事不喜的工作; 失去; 盗窃; 剥夺; 遗弃; 傲慢; 高傲; 无能

description.en: The waxing moon of mercy sheds drops of light; a path between two towers leads into the unknown. Dog and wolf howl, a crayfish crawls from the pool. Reflected intellect stirs animal fears; beyond lies the unseen abyss. Be still; let lower nature quiet and the shapes sink back.
description.zh-CN: 渐盈的月洒下光滴,小径穿过双塔通往未知；狗与狼长嚎,螯虾自水而出。反射之智唤醒兽性的恐惧,光外是不可见的深渊。讯息是安静,让下层本性平息,深处之影自会退去。

upright.en: Anxiety and wavering; inner unrest; lies; ambiguity; being bewitched or led astray; hidden turmoil; deception; termination; uneasy love; a love triangle
upright.zh-CN: 不安与动摇; 心中不平静; 谎言; 暧昧不明; 鬼迷心窍; 暗藏动乱; 欺骗; 终止; 不安的爱; 三角关系

reversed.en: Escaping a dangerous deception; conditions improving slightly; misunderstandings dissolving; clearing away confusion; time can solve everything; keep a long-term view; wait and observe calmly; early discovery and early treatment are effective; sensing danger beforehand; no longer caring about a false and insincere relationship
reversed.zh-CN: 从危险的骗局中逃脱; 状况稍为好转; 误会冰释; 破除迷惘; 时间能解决一切; 眼光要长远; 静观等待; 早期发现早期治疗有效; 事前察知危险; 对虚情假意的恋情已不在乎

description.en: A radiant sun shines over sunflowers as a naked child rides a white horse with scarlet banner. It marks the restored world and passage from reflected moonlight to true Spirit. Innocence is wisdom and simplicity, the child of the new Adam, great light leading humanity home.
description.zh-CN: 灿日照耀向日葵墙,裸童骑白马持红旗前行,象征复原的世界与由反射月光迈向灵性真光；此处的纯真即智慧与单纯,新的亚当之子,引领人类归途的圣光。

upright.en: Abundant life force; a great sense of achievement; excellent relationships; happy love; a heart full of passion and strength; promises certain to be fulfilled; soaring success; freedom from care
upright.zh-CN: 丰富的生命力; 巨大的成就感; 人际关系非常好; 爱情美满; 内心充满了热情和力量; 一定能够实现的约定; 飞黄腾达; 无忧无虑

reversed.en: Low spirits; failure; the departure of friends and worsening relationships; inability to settle the heart; depression, loneliness, and isolation; troubles in love; canceled plans; many difficulties at work
reversed.zh-CN: 情绪低落; 事情失败; 朋友的离去和人际关系的恶化; 无法安定内心; 忧郁孤单寂寞; 爱情不顺利; 取消的计划; 工作上困难重重

description.en: A great angel in clouds blows the cross-marked trumpet as the dead rise, faces filled with wonder. It records the completed work of transmutation answering the Supernal call within, hinting at the inner trumpet that awakens lower nature. It is a card of eternal life.
description.zh-CN: 大天使于云间吹响带十字旗的号角,亡者男女孩童出墓而起,神情惊喜。此牌记录回应至高召唤的炼化完成,也暗指内在号角瞬间唤醒下层本性,是永生的象征。

upright.en: The joy of resurrection; improving fortune; going public; a period of reform; crisis lifted; decisiveness; promotion; emerging into view; good news; a messenger of love; restored health; confession; revived love; reunion; a miracle of love
upright.zh-CN: 复活的喜悦; 开运; 公开; 改革期; 危机解除; 决断; 荣升; 崭露头角; 好消息; 爱的使者; 恢复健康; 坦白; 复苏的爱; 再会; 爱的奇迹

reversed.en: Unable to recover from one defeat; disillusionment; a long way still to recovery; an unfavorable decision; rejection; ending before it even begins; bad news; delay; inability to decide; starting over only to return to the same old state; separation; elimination; reluctance to let go
reversed.zh-CN: 一败不起; 幻灭; 离复苏还有很长的时间; 不利的决定; 不被采用; 还未开始就结束了; 坏消息; 延期; 无法决定; 虽重新开始却又恢复原状; 分离; 消除; 恋恋不舍

description.en: A wreath encloses a dancing figure with two wands, while Ezekiel's four living creatures fill the corners. It is the perfection and consummation of the cosmos, the soul in divine vision, the joy when all was declared good. It is not the Absolute nor the Magus crowned.
description.zh-CN: 花环环绕舞动的披纱之人双持权杖,四角列以西结的四生灵。此牌象征宇宙的圆满与终结、灵魂处于神圣观照中的喜悦,回响万物皆善之日,并非绝对或登顶的魔术师。

upright.en: Completion; success; a life's calling in hand; achieving one's goal; continuity; the peak period; perfection; luck through contact with foreign places; meeting the standard; spiritual exhilaration; a happy ending; an exemplary couple
upright.zh-CN: 完成; 成功; 拥有毕生的志业; 达成目标; 永续不断; 最盛期; 完美无缺; 接触异国将获得幸运; 到达标准; 精神亢奋; 快乐的结束; 模范情侣

reversed.en: Incompletion; inability to reach the planned achievement; failure through inadequate preparation; unable to continue halfway through; incomplete burning; temporary setbacks; saturation; ongoing worries; mental slackness; one's habitual style of expression; emotional frustration caused by immaturity; collusion; an attitude lacking smoothness
reversed.zh-CN: 未完成; 无法达到计划中的成就; 因准备不足而失败; 中途无法再进行; 不完全燃烧; 一时不顺利; 饱和状态; 烦恼延续; 精神松弛; 个人惯用的表现方式; 因不成熟而使情感受挫; 合谋; 态度不够圆融

description.en: A hand issuing from a cloud grasps a stout wand or club. It signifies the source of creation, invention, and enterprise, representing the virility behind all beginnings.
description.zh-CN: 云中伸出一只手,紧握着巨大的权杖。这是创造、发明与事业的源头,象征着阳刚的原始力量与起点的契机。它不仅是企业的起点,更预示着家族、血统的起源以及随之而来的财富与继承。

upright.en: Creation; invention; enterprise; principles; a beginning; family origin; wealth; inheritance; virile force
upright.zh-CN: 创造; 发明; 事业心; 原则; 起点; 家族起源; 财富; 继承; 阳刚之力

reversed.en: Decline; destruction; failure; extinction; joy overshadowed by dark clouds; some kind of fated misfortune
reversed.zh-CN: 衰退; 毁灭; 失败; 灭亡; 阴云笼罩的喜悦; 某种注定的厄运

description.en: A tall man looks from a battlemented roof over sea and shore; he holds a globe in his right hand. It suggests the magnificence of worldly wealth, yet hints at the sadness of Alexander amidst the grandeur of dominion.
description.zh-CN: 一位领主站在城墙顶端,手持地球仪,俯瞰着他的领地与海洋。左侧的玫瑰、十字与百合徽记暗示着灵性与物质的结合。这是亚历山大式的忧郁——坐拥世间财富与宏伟,却在权力的顶峰感到一丝孤独与悲伤,彷佛那是面对世界壮丽时的无力感。

upright.en: Wealth; grandeur; dominion; splendor; minor disappointments; bodily pain and sorrow; humiliation
upright.zh-CN: 财富; 宏伟; 统治权; 辉煌; 琐碎的失望; 身体的痛苦与悲伤; 羞辱

reversed.en: Surprise; confusion; fascination; emotional fluctuations; fear; trouble
reversed.zh-CN: 惊奇; 困惑; 着迷; 情感波动; 恐惧; 麻烦

description.en: A calm, stately personage, with his back turned, looking from a cliff's edge at ships passing over the sea. He symbolizes established strength and enterprise, viewing his merchandise sailing over the sea.
description.zh-CN: 一位庄严的人物背对我们,立于悬崖边缘,凝视着满载货物的船只驶向远方。这象征着稳固的力量与商业的远见,仿佛一位成功的商业巨子正在此岸展望彼岸的合作与援助,预示着探索与发现的成果即将到来。

upright.en: Established strength; initiative; effort; trade; business; discovery; business cooperation that can provide help
upright.zh-CN: 稳固的力量; 进取心; 努力; 贸易; 商业; 发现; 能够提供帮助的商业合作

reversed.en: The end of adversity; trouble ceasing; disappointment stopping; a breather after hard work
reversed.zh-CN: 逆境结束; 麻烦中止; 失望停止; 辛苦后的喘息

description.en: Garlands hang between four wands; two female figures uplift nosegays near a bridge leading to an old manorial house. It represents a haven of refuge, repose, and concord.
description.zh-CN: 四根巨大的权杖间悬挂着丰收的花环,两位女子高举花束,背景是通往古老庄园的桥梁。这是乡村生活的田园牧歌,象征着避风港、家庭的丰收庆典、和谐与完美的安息。这是和平与繁荣的定格。

upright.en: Country life; a refuge; family celebration; rest; harmony; prosperity; peace; perfect work results
upright.zh-CN: 乡村生活; 避难所; 家庭庆典; 休息; 和谐; 繁荣; 和平; 完美的工作成果

reversed.en: Prosperity continuing; beauty; happiness; decoration; joyful gatherings; a married woman giving birth to a beautiful child
reversed.zh-CN: 繁荣持续; 美丽; 幸福; 装饰; 快乐的聚会; 已婚妇女生下漂亮的孩子

description.en: A posse of youths are brandishing staves, as if in sport or strife. It is mimic warfare, symbolizing the strenuous competition and struggle of the search after riches and fortune.
description.zh-CN: 一群少年正挥舞手杖,似是游戏又似争斗。这是一场模拟的战争,象征着为了财富与命运而进行的剧烈竞争,以及人生战场上的奋斗与角逐。在这里,只有通过激烈的对抗才能获得金子与利益。

upright.en: Imitation; mock combat; fierce competition; struggle in pursuit of wealth; the battle of life; money and gains
upright.zh-CN: 模拟; 模拟战斗; 激烈的竞争; 追求财富的奋斗; 生活的战斗; 金钱与收益

reversed.en: Litigation; disputes; fraud; conflict; quarrels that may turn into an advantage
reversed.zh-CN: 诉讼; 纠纷; 欺诈; 矛盾; 争吵可能转化为优势

description.en: A laurelled horseman bears one staff adorned with a laurel crown. It is a victor triumphing, representing great news and expectation crowned with its own desire.
description.zh-CN: 戴着桂冠的骑士骑马前行,手持饰有花环的权杖,随从簇拥。这是凯旋的胜利者,象征着期望在欲望中加冕,是带来重大喜讯的国王信使。这是希望的桂冠,是成功的确据。

upright.en: A victor's triumph; major news; expectations fulfilled; hope crowned; loss of trust in a servant (additional meaning)
upright.zh-CN: 胜利者凯旋; 重大消息; 期望达成; 希望的加冕; 仆人失去信任(额外)

reversed.en: Fear; anxiety; the enemy of victory at the gate; betrayal; disloyalty; indefinite delay
reversed.zh-CN: 恐惧; 忧虑; 胜利的敌人在门口; 背叛; 不忠; 无限期的延迟

description.en: A young man on a craggy eminence brandishing a staff; six other staves are raised towards him from below. It signifies valour and the vantage position, indicating success where the combatant is on top.
description.zh-CN: 年轻人站在崎岖的高处,挥舞手杖抵御下方伸出的六根权杖。这象征着英勇与优势地位,在智力层面上代表争论与商业谈判中的博弈。即便孤身一人,由于占据高地,敌人也无法触及,胜利终将属于占据上风者。

upright.en: Valor; an advantageous position; discussion; verbal conflict; business negotiation; commercial competition; success
upright.zh-CN: 英勇; 优势地位; 讨论; 言语冲突; 商业谈判; 交易竞争; 成功

reversed.en: Confusion; embarrassment; anxiety; indecision; warnings arising from hesitation
reversed.zh-CN: 困惑; 尴尬; 焦虑; 犹豫不决; 犹豫导致的警告

description.en: A flight of wands through an open country; they draw to the term of their course. It signifies motion through the immovable, swiftness, and great haste towards an assured end.
description.zh-CN: 八根权杖如飞箭般划过开阔的田野,似乎在穿越静止的空间。这象征着极速的行动、即将到来的结局,以及那是爱的利箭,正飞向许诺幸福的终点。一切都在运动中,目标触手可及。

upright.en: Action; trajectory of movement; great speed; a special messenger; great hope; racing toward a happy ending; arrows of love
upright.zh-CN: 行动; 活动路径; 极速; 特使; 巨大的希望; 奔向幸福的终点; 爱的利箭

reversed.en: Arrows of jealousy; inner conflict; accusations of conscience; quarrels; family disputes
reversed.zh-CN: 嫉妒之箭; 内心的争斗; 良心谴责; 争吵; 家庭纷争

description.en: The figure leans upon his staff and has an expectant look, as if awaiting an enemy. It signifies strength in opposition and the formidable antagonist.
description.zh-CN: 他依靠着手杖,神情警惕,身后排列着八根如同栅栏般的权杖。这象征着对抗中的力量与防御,即便遭遇攻击,他那强健的体魄也足以成为令人生畏的对手。这是在风暴来临前的等待与坚持。

upright.en: Strength in opposition; boldly meeting the attack; a formidable opponent; delay; pause; adjournment
upright.zh-CN: 对抗中的力量; 大胆迎击; 强大的对手; 延期; 暂停; 休会

reversed.en: Obstacles; adversity; disaster; a bad card in a general sense
reversed.zh-CN: 障碍; 逆境; 灾难; 坏牌(普遍意义)

description.en: A man oppressed by the weight of the ten staves which he is carrying. It signifies oppression, but also fortune, gain, and any kind of success that is burdensome.
description.zh-CN: 一个男人被他所背负的十根权杖压得直不起腰。这象征着财富与成功带来的沉重压迫。虽然也是收获与获利,但更是一种伪装的荣耀,那是通往目的地的苦行。如果随后出现宝剑九,则意味着彻底的失败。

upright.en: Oppression; wealth; profit; success; false appearances; disguise; treachery
upright.zh-CN: 压迫; 财富; 获利; 成功; 虚假的外表; 伪装; 背信弃义

reversed.en: Contradictions; difficulties; conspiracy
reversed.zh-CN: 矛盾; 困难; 阴谋;

description.en: A young man stands in the act of proclamation. He is unknown but faithful, and his tidings are strange. He is a faithful lover, an envoy, or a postman.
description.zh-CN: 一位年轻人在类似旷野的场景中宣告,他虽然陌生但忠诚。他象征着一位带来奇异消息的信使,一位忠实的恋人,或是家族中聪慧的后辈。若他身旁伴随着代表男性的牌,他将为其提供有利的证词。

upright.en: Loyalty; a lover; envoy; postman; favorable testimony; family wisdom; a noble young man seeking a young lady
upright.zh-CN: 忠诚; 恋人; 特使; 邮差; 有利证词; 家族智慧; 寻找年轻女士的贵族青年

reversed.en: Anecdotes; announcements; bad news; indecision; instability
reversed.zh-CN: 轶事; 公告; 坏消息; 优柔寡断; 不稳定

description.en: He is shewn as if upon a journey, armed with a short wand, and although mailed is not on a warlike errand. He is passing mounds or pyramids, suggesting departure, flight, or emigration.
description.zh-CN: 他全副武装骑在马上,正如行进在旅途中,越过金字塔般的土丘。但他并非为了战争而来,马匹的动态暗示了急躁的情绪。这象征着离去、缺席,或是为了寻求改变而进行的迁徙。

upright.en: Setting out; absence; escape; relocation; friendliness; change of residence
upright.zh-CN: 启程; 缺席; 逃离; 移居; 友善; 改变住所

reversed.en: Rupture; division; interruption; discord; estrangement; a troubled marriage
reversed.zh-CN: 决裂; 分裂; 中断; 不和; 疏远; 婚姻受挫

description.en: The Queen of flowering wands, her personality corresponds to that of the King, but is more magnetic. She represents a dark, friendly, chaste, and loving woman.
description.zh-CN: 她手持发芽的权杖,展现出比国王更具磁性的魅力。她代表着一位友善、贞洁且充满爱意的女性,拥有独立的经济能力与务实的智慧。她不仅不仅能给予爱,也象征着在商业上的某种成功。

upright.en: Friendliness; chastity; full of affection; honor; love of money; success in business; abundance
upright.zh-CN: 友善; 贞洁; 充满爱意; 荣誉; 爱财; 商业成功; 丰收

reversed.en: Kindness; frugality; helpfulness; but it may also mean opposition; jealousy; deception; disloyalty; willing but unable
reversed.zh-CN: 善良; 节俭; 乐于助人; 但也可能意味着反对; 嫉妒; 欺骗; 不忠; 有心无力

description.en: The King uplifts a flowering wand, and wears a cap of maintenance beneath his crown. His nature is dark, ardent, lithe, animated, and impassioned.
description.zh-CN: 他举起开花的权杖,王座背饰以狮子徽记。他的天性黑暗而热烈,敏捷而生动。他象征着诚实、良知以及可能到来的意外遗产,是一位值得信赖的朋友,通常代表一位已婚且正直的男性。

upright.en: Friendly; a country gentleman; married; honest; conscience; an unexpected inheritance; a happy marriage
upright.zh-CN: 友善; 乡下人; 已婚; 诚实; 良知; 意外的遗产; 美满的婚姻

reversed.en: Kind but strict; stern yet tolerant; advice worth following
reversed.zh-CN: 善良但严厉; 苛刻但宽容; 建议值得遵循

description.en: The waters are beneath, and thereon are water-lilies; the hand issues from the cloud, holding in its palm the cup, from which four streams are pouring; a dove, bearing in its bill a cross-marked Host, descends to place the Wafer in the Cup. It is an intimation of that which may lie behind the Lesser Arcana.
description.zh-CN: 云中伸出的手掌托举着圣杯,四道源流从中倾泻而下,滋润着下方平静水面上的睡莲。象征圣灵的鸽子衔着刻有十字的圣体,正将其降入杯中。这是一张深藏奥秘的牌,它不仅是小阿尔克那背后的灵性暗示,更是“真心之屋”(House of the True Heart),象征着神圣的滋养、喜悦的源头以及不仅限于物质的丰盛与多产。

upright.en: House of the true heart; joy; satisfaction; dwelling; nourishment; abundance; fertility; the sacred table; happiness; steadfast will; unchanging law
upright.zh-CN: 真心之屋; 喜悦; 满足; 住所; 滋养; 丰盛; 多产; 神圣的餐桌; 幸福; 坚定的意志; 不变的法则

reversed.en: A false heart; sudden upheaval; instability; revolution; an unexpected change of status
reversed.zh-CN: 虚假之心; 突变; 不稳定; 革命; 意想不到的地位改变

description.en: A youth and maiden are pledging one another, and above their cups rises the Caduceus of Hermes, between the great wings of which there appears a lion's head. It represents that desire which is not in Nature, but by which Nature is sanctified.
description.zh-CN: 一位青年与少女正举杯互誓,而在他们那交融的杯影之上,赫尔墨斯的双蛇杖(Caduceus)正缓缓升起,巨大的双翼间显现出狮首。这不仅是两性的交融,更象征着一种超越原始自然的渴望——通过这种渴望,自然本身得以被神圣化。这是爱、热情与亲和力的完美象征,是二元对立中的和谐统一。

upright.en: Love; passion; friendship; affinity; union; harmony; sympathy; a relationship between the sexes; wealth and honor
upright.zh-CN: 爱; 热情; 友谊; 亲和力; 结合; 和谐; 同情; 两性关系; 财富与荣誉

reversed.en: False love; folly; misunderstanding; passion (reversed: passion)
reversed.zh-CN: 虚假的爱; 愚蠢; 误解; 激情(Reversed: Passion)

description.en: Maidens in a garden-ground with cups uplifted, as if pledging one another. It signifies the conclusion of any matter in plenty, perfection and merriment.
description.zh-CN: 三位少女在丰茂的庭园中高举圣杯,彼此祝祷。这象征着事情在圆满、完美与欢乐中落幕。这是胜利的喜悦,是身心的慰藉与治愈。它描绘了生命中那些幸福的结局,以及在物质层面上的充实与欢庆。

upright.en: A successful conclusion; perfection; joy; a happy result; victory; comfort; healing; unexpected promotion (especially for a soldier)
upright.zh-CN: 圆满结束; 完美; 欢乐; 幸福的结果; 胜利; 慰藉; 治愈; 意想不到的晋升(军人)

reversed.en: Excess; impatience; ending; achievement; excessive sensual pleasure; physical gratification; healing
reversed.zh-CN: 过度; 急躁; 终结; 成就; 过度的感官享受; 身体的快感; 治愈

description.en: A young man is seated under a tree and contemplates three cups set on the grass before him; an arm issuing from a cloud offers him another cup. His expression is one of discontent with his environment.
description.zh-CN: 年轻人坐在树下,凝视着草地上的三个杯子,神情中流露出对周遭环境的不满与厌倦。尽管云中伸出的手向他递来第四个杯子——那或许是仙境的礼物——但他却视而不见。这象征着世俗欢愉后的饱足与厌恶,一种源自想象的烦恼,仿佛世间的美酒只能带来空虚。

upright.en: Weariness; aversion; disgust; imagined troubles; satiety; mixed pleasures
upright.zh-CN: 厌倦; 反感; 厌恶; 想象的烦恼; 饱足感; 混合的快乐

reversed.en: Novelty; omens; new instructions; a new relationship; premonition
reversed.zh-CN: 新奇; 预兆; 新的指示; 新的关系; 预感

description.en: A dark, cloaked figure, looking sideways at three prone cups two others stand upright behind him; a bridge is in the background. It is a card of loss, but something remains over.
description.zh-CN: 一个身披深色斗篷的身影侧身伫立,注视着地上倾倒的三个杯子,却未察觉身后仍有两杯立着。远处的桥梁通向一座城堡。这是一张关于损失的牌,但也暗示着并非一无所有。它可能象征着某种苦涩的遗产传递,或是一段伴随着挫败与遗憾的婚姻/结合。

upright.en: Loss; what remains; inheritance; ancestral property; transfer or succession below expectation; a bitter marriage; a happy marriage (alternate Section 4 meaning); gifts; success
upright.zh-CN: 损失; 残留之物; 遗产; 祖产; 传递(不如预期); 苦涩的婚姻; 幸福的婚姻(Section 4备选); 礼物; 成功

reversed.en: News; alliance; affinity; blood relatives; ancestors; return; false plans; the long-awaited return of a loved one
reversed.zh-CN: 消息; 联盟; 亲和力; 血亲; 祖先; 归来; 虚假的计划; 亲人久别归来

description.en: Children in an old garden, their cups filled with flowers. It is a card of the past and of memories, looking back on childhood.
description.zh-CN: 古老的庭园中,孩子们正将鲜花装满圣杯。这是一张关于过去与回忆的牌,象征着回望童年时的纯真与快乐,那是已经逝去的美好时光。然而,它也暗示着新的环境与知识,如同孩子们在陌生的庭院中嬉戏。

upright.en: The past; memories; childhood; joy; enjoyment; things long gone; pleasant recollections
upright.zh-CN: 过去; 回忆; 童年; 快乐; 享受; 逝去的事物; 愉快的回忆

reversed.en: The future; renewal; what is about to happen; an inheritance arriving quickly
reversed.zh-CN: 未来; 更新; 即将发生之事; 快速到来的遗产

description.en: Strange chalices of vision, but the images are more especially those of the fantastic spirit. It signifies fairy favours, images of reflection, sentiment, imagination.
description.zh-CN: 七只奇异的圣杯中浮现出各种幻象,那是奇幻精神的产物。这象征着“仙女的恩赐”,是沉思之镜中的影像,是情感与想象的投射。虽然在这些领域可能有所造诣,但正如这些幻影一般,其中并无永恒或实质的事物。

upright.en: The gifts of fairies; images; emotion; imagination; visions in contemplation; some sort of achievement, though not lasting; a blond child; ideas; design
upright.zh-CN: 仙女的恩赐; 映像; 情感; 想象; 沉思中的景象; 某种成就(但不持久); 金发小孩; 想法; 设计

reversed.en: Desire; will; determination; plans; success (if accompanied by the Three of Cups)
reversed.zh-CN: 欲望; 意志; 决心; 计划; 成功(若伴随圣杯三)

description.en: A man of dejected aspect is deserting the cups of his felicity, enterprise, undertaking or previous concern. It speaks for itself on the surface, but other readings are entirely antithetical.
description.zh-CN: 一个神情沮丧的人正转身离去,抛下他曾经的快乐、事业或关注之事——那八只排列整齐的圣杯。这通常象征着一件事情的衰退,或者原本看似重要之事其实无足轻重。它描绘了放弃与远离的时刻。

upright.en: Giving joy; gentleness; shyness; honor; humility; the decline of a matter; of little importance; marriage to a fair-haired woman
upright.zh-CN: 给予喜悦; 温和; 害羞; 荣誉; 谦虚; 事情的衰退; 并不重要; 与金发女子结婚

reversed.en: Great joy; happiness; a feast; perfect contentment
reversed.zh-CN: 巨大的喜悦; 幸福; 盛宴; 完美的满足

description.en: A goodly personage has feasted to his heart's content, and abundant refreshment of wine is on the arched counter behind him. The picture offers the material side only.
description.zh-CN: 一位面容和善的人物心满意足地端坐着,身后半圆形的桌上排列着九只满溢的圣杯,仿佛未来已有了保障。这张牌展现了物质层面的极致——和谐、满足与身体的安适。这是胜利与成功的象征,预示着询问者将获得他所寻求的优势。

upright.en: Harmony; satisfaction; bodily comfort; victory; success; advantage; a favorable omen for military personnel
upright.zh-CN: 和谐; 满足; 身体的舒适; 胜利; 成功; 优势; 军事人员的好兆头

reversed.en: Truth; loyalty; freedom; error; imperfection; good business
reversed.zh-CN: 真理; 忠诚; 自由; 错误; 不完美; 好生意

description.en: Appearance of Cups in a rainbow; it is contemplated in wonder and ecstacy by a man and woman below, evidently husband and wife. It signifies contentment, repose of the entire heart.
description.zh-CN: 一道彩虹横跨天际,十只圣杯镶嵌其中。下方的一对夫妇与其子女正充满惊奇与狂喜地仰望这一奇景。这象征着内心的彻底安息与满足,是人间之爱与友谊的完美境界。这是幸福的家庭,是宁静的港湾。

upright.en: Contentment; rest of the heart; a perfect state; human love; friendship; someone looking after the seeker's interests; a place of residence; a happy marriage
upright.zh-CN: 知足; 内心的安息; 完美状态; 人类之爱; 友谊; 照顾询问者利益的人; 居住地; 美满的婚姻

reversed.en: The rest of a false heart; anger; violence; sorrow; serious quarrels
reversed.zh-CN: 虚假之心的安息; 愤怒; 暴力; 悲伤; 严重的争吵

description.en: A fair, pleasing, somewhat effeminate page, of studious and intent aspect, contemplates a fish rising from a cup to look at him. It is the pictures of the mind taking form.
description.zh-CN: 一位面容姣好、略显阴柔的侍从,正专注地凝视着手中杯里浮出的一条鱼。这是思维图像化的过程,象征着想象力正在成形。他代表着一位勤奋好学的青年,带来消息或致力于服务；也暗示着冥想与反思。

upright.en: A fair-haired youth; willing to serve; diligence; news; messages; applications; reflection; meditation; business thinking; a young man unlucky in love
upright.zh-CN: 金发青年; 乐于服务; 勤奋; 消息; 讯息; 申请; 反思; 冥想; 商业思考; 爱情不顺的青年

reversed.en: Taste; inclination; attachment; temptation; deception; trickery; various obstacles
reversed.zh-CN: 品味; 倾向; 依恋; 诱惑; 欺骗; 诡计; 各种障碍

description.en: Graceful, but not warlike; riding quietly, wearing a winged helmet, referring to those higher graces of the imagination. He too is a dreamer, but the images of the side of sense haunt him in his vision.
description.zh-CN: 他优雅地骑行,头戴饰有双翼的头盔,但这并非为了战争,而是象征想象力的崇高恩赐。他是一位梦想家,然而感官世界的影像却萦绕在他的幻视之中。他代表着某种到来或接近——也许是一位使者,带来邀约、提议或某种诱导。

upright.en: Arrival; approach; messenger; proposal; attitude; invitation; provocation; a friend bringing unexpected money
upright.zh-CN: 到来; 接近; 使者; 提议; 态度; 邀请; 煽动; 带来意外之财的朋友

reversed.en: Trickery; devices; cunning; swindling; duplicity; deception; irregularity
reversed.zh-CN: 诡计; 技俩; 狡猾; 诈骗;两面派; 欺诈; 不规则

description.en: Beautiful, fair, dreamy--as one who sees visions in a cup. She sees, but she also acts, and her activity feeds her dream. She represents loving intelligence, and hence the gift of vision.
description.zh-CN: 她美丽、白皙而梦幻,仿佛正在圣杯中凝视着某种幻象。然而她不仅是旁观者,更是一位行动者,她的行动滋养着她的梦。她象征着充满爱意的智慧,因此拥有着预见的天赋。她是完美的妻子与母亲,是美德与幸福的化身。

upright.en: A kind woman; honesty; loyalty; loving wisdom; the gift of foresight; success; happiness; joy; wisdom; virtue; a perfect spouse
upright.zh-CN: 善良的女性; 诚实; 忠诚; 充满爱意的智慧; 远见的天赋; 成功; 幸福; 快乐; 智慧; 美德; 完美的配偶

reversed.en: A distinguished yet untrusted woman; an eccentric woman; vice; disgrace; corruption; a wealthy or illustrious marriage
reversed.zh-CN: 杰出但不被信任的女性; 乖僻的女性; 罪恶; 耻辱; 堕落; 富有或显赫的婚姻

description.en: He holds a short sceptre in his left hand and a great cup in his right; his throne is set upon the sea. He represents equity, art and science, including those who profess science, law and art; creative intelligence.
description.zh-CN: 他手持短权杖与巨大的圣杯,王座安设于大海之上,波涛中有船只与海豚。他象征着公平、艺术与科学,以及那些富有创造性的智慧。作为一位从商者、法律人或神职人员,他是负责任的,并乐于助人。

upright.en: A fair-haired man; merchant; person of law or theology; responsible; helpful; fair; art; science; creative intelligence; beware of hypocrisy
upright.zh-CN: 金发男性; 商人; 法律或神学人士; 负责任; 乐于助人; 公平; 艺术; 科学; 创造性智慧; 谨防伪善

reversed.en: Dishonesty; a double-dealing man; fraud; extortion; injustice; vice; scandal; plunder; major loss
reversed.zh-CN: 不诚实; 双重交易的男性; 欺诈; 勒索; 不公正; 罪恶; 丑闻; 掠夺; 重大损失

description.en: A hand issues from a cloud, grasping a sword, the point of which is encircled by a crown. It is a card of great force, triumph, and the excessive degree in everything.
description.zh-CN: 云间之手紧握着被皇冠环绕剑尖的宝剑。它代表巨大的力量、胜利以及事物发展到极致的程度。

upright.en: Victory; conquest; force in its extreme degree; power in love and hatred; the crown hints at a higher meaning
upright.zh-CN: 胜利; 征服; 力量的极致; 爱恨中的力量; 冠冕暗示更高的意义

reversed.en: The result is disastrous; conception; childbirth; increase; multiplication
reversed.zh-CN: 结果是灾难性的; 概念; 生育; 增加; 倍增

description.en: A hoodwinked female figure balances two swords upon her shoulders. It suggests conformity, equipoise, courage, friendship, and concord in a state of arms.
description.zh-CN: 一位蒙眼的女性平衡地将两把剑置于双肩之上。这象征着顺从与平衡,以及在武装对峙状态下的勇气、友谊与和谐。

upright.en: Conformity; balance; courage; friendship; harmony; intimacy; gifts; help from benefactors
upright.zh-CN: 顺从; 平衡; 勇气; 友谊; 和谐; 亲密关系; 礼物; 贵人相助

reversed.en: Imposture; falseness; deception; disloyalty; dealings with a rogue
reversed.zh-CN: 冒名顶替; 虚假; 欺骗; 不忠; 与流氓打交道

description.en: Three swords pierce a heart, set against a backdrop of cloud and rain. It signifies removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, and dispersion.
description.zh-CN: 三把剑穿透一颗心脏,背景是阴云和雨。象征着移开、缺席、延误、分裂、破裂和分散,以及设计自然暗示的一切。

upright.en: Removal of obstacles; necessary separation; delay or interruption (neutral); the pain of facing reality
upright.zh-CN: 移除障碍; 必要的分别; 延期或中止 (中性); 面对现实的痛苦

reversed.en: Mental disturbance; error; loss; distraction; confusion; the passing away of a lady's affections; meeting again someone once estranged; a nun
reversed.zh-CN: 精神错乱; 错误; 损失; 分心; 混乱; 女士感情的逝去; 再次遇到已断交者; 修女

description.en: The effigy of a knight is shown in the attitude of prayer, at full length upon his tomb. It denotes vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit's repose, exile, tomb, and coffin.
description.zh-CN: 一位骑士的肖像以祈祷的姿势,完全躺在他的墓碑上。象征着警觉、退隐、孤独、隐士的休养、流放、墓地与棺材。

upright.en: Wise management; prudence; economy; prevention; a will or testament; limited success through careful management
upright.zh-CN: 明智的管理; 谨慎; 节约; 预防; 遗嘱; 借由明智管理可获得有限成功

reversed.en: A bad omen; the reversed meaning is somewhat milder than the upright one
reversed.zh-CN: 一个坏兆头; (逆位本身含义较正位柔和)

description.en: A disdainful man looks after two retreating and dejected figures. He is the master in possession of the field. It signifies degradation, destruction, infamy, dishonour, and loss.
description.zh-CN: 一个傲慢的男人看着两个沮丧退去的人。他是战场的主宰。它象征着堕落、毁灭、恶名、耻辱和损失。

upright.en: Avoiding conflict; recognizing losses; learning from experience; accepting humiliation (neutral or cautionary)
upright.zh-CN: 避免冲突; 认识到损失; 学习经验; 接受屈辱 (中性/警示)

reversed.en: Same as the upright meaning; burial and funerals; attacks on the seeker's wealth; sorrow and mourning
reversed.zh-CN: 与正位含义相同; 埋葬与丧事; 攻击求问者的财富; 悲伤与哀悼

description.en: A ferryman carries passengers in his punt to the further shore. It means passage, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient, and travel by water.
description.zh-CN: 一个船夫载着乘客乘船前往远处的岸边。它意味着水上旅行、路线、方式、使者、受托人、权宜之计。

upright.en: Declaration; confession; going public; courtship; the journey will be pleasant
upright.zh-CN: 声明; 坦白; 公开; 求爱; 旅程将是愉快的

reversed.en: An unfavorable result in litigation
reversed.zh-CN: 诉讼结果不利

description.en: A man in the act of carrying away five swords rapidly, leaving two stuck in the ground near a camp. It indicates design, attempt, wish, confidence, and quarrelling; uncertain import.
description.zh-CN: 一个人急匆匆地带走五把剑,剩下两把插在营地附近的地面。这预示着设计、尝试、愿望、信心和争吵；其含义不确定。

upright.en: Good advice; counsel; guidance; country life
upright.zh-CN: 好的建议; 劝告; 指导; 乡村生活

reversed.en: Slander; gossip; good advice may be ignored
reversed.zh-CN: 诽谤; 饶舌; 好的建议可能被忽略

description.en: A woman, bound and hoodwinked, with the swords about her. It is a card of temporary durance, bad news, crisis, censure, and sickness.
description.zh-CN: 一个被束缚和蒙眼的女人,周围环绕着剑。这是一张代表短暂束缚、坏消息、危机、谴责和疾病的牌。

upright.en: Temporary bondage; conscious endurance
upright.zh-CN: 暂时的束缚; 有意识地忍耐

reversed.en: Anxiety; difficulties; opposition; accidents; betrayal; unforeseen events; fate; slander directed at a woman
reversed.zh-CN: 不安; 困难; 反对; 事故; 背叛; 不可预见的事情; 宿命; 针对女性的诽谤

description.en: One seated on her couch in lamentation, with the swords over her. It is a card of utter desolation, death, failure, miscarriage, deception, and despair.
description.zh-CN: 一个人坐在床上悲叹,九把剑悬于她上方。这是一张代表彻底荒凉、死亡、失败、流产、欺骗和绝望的牌。

upright.en: Clergy; a priest; sufficient reason to suspect a doubtful person
upright.zh-CN: 神职人员; 牧师; 对可疑之人有充分的怀疑理由

reversed.en: Imprisonment; suspicion; justified fear; shame; a generally bad omen
reversed.zh-CN: 监禁; 怀疑; 合理的恐惧; 羞耻; 普遍的坏兆头

description.en: A prostrate figure, pierced by all the swords. It signifies pain, affliction, tears, sadness, and desolation.
description.zh-CN: 一个倒地的人,被十把剑刺穿。它象征着痛苦、苦难、眼泪、悲伤和荒凉。

upright.en: Advantage; profit; success; favor, though not lasting; power and authority; military victory
upright.zh-CN: 优势; 利润; 成功; 好感 (但非永久); 权力与权威; 军事胜利

reversed.en: Loss; pain; sorrow; desolation; imprisonment; betrayal by friends
reversed.zh-CN: 损失; 痛苦; 悲伤; 荒凉; 监禁; 朋友的背叛

description.en: A lithe, active figure holds a sword upright in both hands. He signifies authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, and examination.
description.zh-CN: 一个轻盈、敏捷的人双手竖立着剑。他象征着权威、监督、秘密服务、警惕、侦查和审查。

upright.en: Authority; oversight; secrecy; vigilance; spying; examination; agile thinking
upright.zh-CN: 权威;监督;秘密;警惕;侦查;审查; 敏捷的思维

reversed.en: The dark side of these qualities; unexpected events; an unprepared state; illness; a rash person prying into the seeker's secrets
reversed.zh-CN: 品质的邪恶面; 意想不到的事; 未准备的状态; 疾病; 窥探求问者秘密的轻率之人

description.en: He is riding in full course, as if scattering his enemies. He signifies skill, bravery, capacity, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, and resistance.
description.zh-CN: 他全力策马奔跑,仿佛要驱散他的敌人。他象征着技能、勇敢、能力、仇恨、愤怒、战争、毁灭和抵抗。

upright.en: Skill; bravery; ability; defense; wisdom; a soldier; an attendant; a mercenary; a prophecy of heroic action
upright.zh-CN: 技能; 勇敢; 能力; 防御; 智慧; 军人; 卫星; 佣兵; 预言英勇行动

reversed.en: Rashness; incompetence; waste; quarrels with foolish people; a woman's struggle with an opponent, who will be conquered
reversed.zh-CN: 轻率; 无能; 浪费; 与愚蠢之人争吵; 女性与对手斗争 (对手将被征服)

description.en: Her countenance is severe but chastened; it suggests familiarity with sorrow. She signifies widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, and separation.
description.zh-CN: 她的面容严厉而内敛,暗示着对忧伤的熟悉。她象征着寡居、女性的悲伤和尴尬、缺席、不育、哀悼和分离。

upright.en: A widow (neutral or descriptive); clarity born from sorrow; a woman with strong discernment
upright.zh-CN: 寡妇 (中性/身份); 历经忧伤的清醒; 辨识力强的女性

reversed.en: Malice; bias; intrigue; excessive chastity; misfortune; deception; a wicked woman with malicious intent
reversed.zh-CN: 恶意; 偏执; 诡计; 过度的贞洁; 不幸; 欺骗; 怀有恶意的坏女人

description.en: He sits in judgment, holding the unsheathed sign of his suit. He signifies power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, and offices of the crown.
description.zh-CN: 他手持未出鞘的剑,端坐审判。他象征着权力、指挥、权威、战斗性智慧、法律和王室职务。

upright.en: Power; command; authority; militant intelligence; law; lawyer; senator; doctor
upright.zh-CN: 权力; 指挥; 权威; 战斗性智慧; 法律; 律师; 参议员; 医生

reversed.en: Cruelty; corruption; brutality; treachery; evil intent; a bad man; a warning to stop a futile lawsuit
reversed.zh-CN: 残忍; 堕落; 野蛮; 背信弃义; 邪恶意图; 坏人; 停止一场徒劳的诉讼的警告

description.en: A hand issues from a cloud, holding up a pentacle. It signifies perfect contentment, felicity, ecstasy; also speedy intelligence, and gold.
description.zh-CN: 一只手从云中伸出,举着一个星币。它象征着完美的满足、幸福、狂喜；也代表快速的情报和黄金。

upright.en: Perfect contentment; happiness; ecstasy; swift intelligence; gold; the most favorable card; comfortable material conditions
upright.zh-CN: 完美的满足; 幸福; 狂喜; 快速的情报; 黄金; 最有利的牌; 舒适的物质条件

reversed.en: The darker side of wealth; bad news; great riches; a share in treasure-seeking (neutral or unexpected)
reversed.zh-CN: 财富的邪恶面; 坏情报; 巨大的财富; 寻宝中的份额 (中性/意外)

description.en: A young man, in the act of dancing, has a pentacle in either hand, joined by an endless cord. It is a card of gaiety, recreation, news, messages in writing, obstacles, agitation, trouble, and embroilment.
description.zh-CN: 一个跳舞的年轻人,两只手各有一个星币,由一条无限的绳索连接。它代表着欢快、娱乐、书面消息、障碍、激动、麻烦和卷入纠纷。

upright.en: Cheerfulness; entertainment; news; written messages; troubles more imagined than real
upright.zh-CN: 欢快; 娱乐; 新闻; 书面消息; 烦恼更多是想象而非真实

reversed.en: Forced gaiety; pretended enjoyment; literalness; handwriting; composition; bills of exchange; a bad omen; ignorance; injustice
reversed.zh-CN: 被迫的欢快; 假装的享受; 字面意义; 笔迹; 组成; 汇票; 坏兆头; 无知; 不公正

description.en: A sculptor at his work in a monastery, often regarded as a card of metier, trade, skilled labour, nobility, aristocracy, renown, and glory.
description.zh-CN: 一位雕塑家在修道院里工作。通常被视为代表行业、贸易、熟练劳动,以及高贵、贵族、声望和荣耀的牌。

upright.en: Trade or profession; commerce; skilled labor; nobility; aristocracy; glory; the eldest son will gain renown
upright.zh-CN: 行业; 贸易; 熟练劳动; 高贵; 贵族; 荣耀; 长子将获得名望

reversed.en: Mediocrity in work; childishness; triviality; weakness; dependent on surrounding cards
reversed.zh-CN: 工作上的平庸; 孩子气; 琐碎; 弱点; 依赖周围的牌

description.en: A crowned figure clasps a pentacle, two others are under his feet. He holds to that which he has. It denotes the surety of possessions, cleaving to what one has, gift, legacy, and inheritance.
description.zh-CN: 一位戴着皇冠的人物紧紧抱着一个星币,另外两个在他的脚下。他紧抓着他所拥有的。它象征着财产的确定性、坚守、礼物、遗产和继承。

upright.en: Security of possessions; holding fast; gifts; legacy; inheritance; a bachelor receiving pleasant news from a lady
upright.zh-CN: 财产的确定性; 坚守; 礼物; 遗产; 继承; 单身汉收到女士的愉快消息

reversed.en: Suspense; delay; opposition; observation; obstacles
reversed.zh-CN: 悬念; 延迟; 反对; 观察; 阻碍

description.en: Two mendicants in a snow-storm pass a lighted casement. It foretells material trouble, destitution, or sometimes love and lovers.
description.zh-CN: 两个乞丐在暴风雪中经过一扇亮着的窗户。它预示着物质上的麻烦、贫困,或者有时也代表爱和恋人。

upright.en: Love and lovers; harmony; affinity; conquering wealth through reason
upright.zh-CN: 爱情和恋人; 和谐; 亲和力; 通过理性征服财富

reversed.en: Chaos; disorder; ruin; quarrels; dissipation; troubles in love
reversed.zh-CN: 混乱; 无序; 毁灭; 争吵; 放荡; 爱情中的麻烦

description.en: A merchant weighs money in scales and distributes it to the needy. It signifies presents, gifts, gratification, vigilance, and present prosperity.
description.zh-CN: 一位商人用秤称量金钱并分发给有需要的人。它象征着礼物、馈赠、满足、警惕,以及当前的繁荣。

upright.en: Gifts; offerings; satisfaction; vigilance; present prosperity; do not rely on the present state alone
upright.zh-CN: 礼物; 馈赠; 满足; 警惕; 当前的繁荣; 不要依赖当下

reversed.en: Desire; greed; jealousy; fantasy; obstacles to the seeker's ambitions
reversed.zh-CN: 欲望; 贪婪; 嫉妒; 幻想; 对求问者抱负的阻碍

description.en: A young man leaning on his staff looks intently at seven pentacles attached to greenery. It is mainly a card of money, business, barter, but readings also include altercation, innocence, and purgation.
description.zh-CN: 一个年轻人倚着他的手杖,专注地看着附着在绿色植物上的七个星币。它主要是一张关于金钱、商业、贸易的牌,但解读也包括争吵、天真和净化。

upright.en: Innocence; originality; purification; improvement in the status of a lady's future husband
upright.zh-CN: 天真; 独创性; 净化; 对女士未来丈夫地位的改善

reversed.en: Anxiety over money that may be lent out; impatience; worry; doubt
reversed.zh-CN: 对可能借出的钱财的焦虑; 不耐烦; 担忧; 怀疑

description.en: An artist in stone at his work, exhibiting his craft. It denotes work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, and skill in craft and business.
description.zh-CN: 一个石雕艺术家在工作,展示他的工艺。它象征着工作、雇佣、委托、手艺和商业技能。

upright.en: Work; employment; craftsmanship; skill; a young tradesman
upright.zh-CN: 工作; 雇佣; 手艺; 技能; 年轻的生意人

reversed.en: Vain ambition; vanity; greed; exacting demands; usury; cunning and intrigue; the seeker will become involved in borrowing or lending problems
reversed.zh-CN: 徒劳的野心; 虚荣; 贪婪; 苛求; 高利贷; 狡猾与阴谋; 求问者将牵涉到借贷问题中

description.en: A woman, with a bird upon her wrist, stands amidst a great abundance of grapevines. It signifies prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, and discernment.
description.zh-CN: 一位手腕上停着一只鸟的女性,站在葡萄园的丰饶之中。它象征着谨慎、安全、成功、成就和洞察力。

upright.en: Prudence; safety; success; accomplishment; discernment; the foretold matter will happen quickly
upright.zh-CN: 谨慎; 安全; 成功; 成就; 洞察力; 预示的事情将迅速实现

reversed.en: Fraud; deception; canceled plans; treachery; vain hope
reversed.zh-CN: 欺诈; 欺骗; 被作废的计划; 背信弃义; 虚妄的希望

description.en: A man and woman beneath an archway, accompanied by a child, meeting an ancient personage with dogs. It signifies gain, riches, family matters, archives, and the abode of a family.
description.zh-CN: 一对男女在一个拱门下,带着一个孩子,遇到一位带着狗的老者。它象征着收获、财富、家庭事务、档案和家族的住所。

upright.en: Gain; riches; family matters; archives; the family home; an occasion that may be fortunate or unfortunate
upright.zh-CN: 收获; 财富; 家庭事务; 档案; 家族住所; 一桩可能幸运或不幸的场合

reversed.en: Chance; fate; loss; robbery; gambling; gifts; dowry; pension
reversed.zh-CN: 偶然; 宿命; 损失; 抢劫; 赌博; 赠予; 嫁妆; 养老金

description.en: A youthful figure, looking intently at the pentacle. He signifies application, study, scholarship, reflection, news, messages, rule, and management.
description.zh-CN: 一个年轻人专注地看着他举起的星币。他象征着勤奋、学习、学术、沉思、新闻、消息、统治和管理。

upright.en: Diligence; study; scholarship; reflection; news; messages; management; a youth; an officer or soldier; a child
upright.zh-CN: 勤奋; 学习; 学术; 沉思; 新闻; 消息; 管理; 青年; 军官或士兵; 孩子

reversed.en: Extravagance; waste; freedom; luxury; unfavorable news; sometimes indicates corruption and plunder
reversed.zh-CN: 挥霍; 浪费; 自由; 奢侈; 不利的消息; 有时指堕落和掠夺

description.en: He rides a slow, enduring horse, and exhibits his symbol. He signifies utility, serviceableness, interest, responsibility, and rectitude on the external plane.
description.zh-CN: 他骑着一匹缓慢而坚韧的马,展示着他的星币。他在外在层面象征着实用性、可用性、兴趣、责任感和正直。

upright.en: Practicality; usefulness; interest; responsibility; integrity; a useful discovery
upright.zh-CN: 实用性; 可用性; 兴趣; 责任感; 正直; 有用的发现

reversed.en: Inertia; laziness; stagnation; discouragement; carelessness; an unemployed warrior
reversed.zh-CN: 惰性; 懒惰; 停滞; 气馁; 粗心; 一位失业的勇士

description.en: The face suggests greatness of soul and serious intelligence. She signifies opulence, generosity, magnificence, security, and liberty.
description.zh-CN: 面容暗示着灵魂的伟大和严肃的智慧。她象征着富裕、慷慨、壮丽、安全和自由。

upright.en: Opulence; generosity; magnificence; security; liberty; gifts; for a young person, a wealthy and happy marriage
upright.zh-CN: 富裕; 慷慨; 壮丽; 安全; 自由; 礼物; 对年轻人来说富裕且幸福的婚姻

reversed.en: Evil; suspicion; suspense; fear; mistrust; illness
reversed.zh-CN: 邪恶; 猜疑; 悬念; 恐惧; 不信任; 疾病

description.en: The figure suggests courage but somewhat lethargic in tendency. He signifies valour, realizing intelligence in business, and success.
description.zh-CN: 人物暗示勇气,但倾向于有些迟钝。他象征着勇猛、在商业中实现智慧,以及成功。

upright.en: Valor; practical intelligence in business; success; talent for numbers; merchant; master; professor
upright.zh-CN: 勇猛; 商业上实现智慧; 成功; 算术天赋; 商人; 主人; 教授

reversed.en: Vice; weakness; ugliness; depravity; corruption; danger; an elderly and malicious man
reversed.zh-CN: 罪恶; 弱点; 丑陋; 堕落; 腐败; 危险; 一位年老且邪恶的男性

description.en: Not sure which spread fits? Tell me what is weighing on you, and I will choose the most suitable spread for your question.
description.zh-CN:
不确定选哪个？
直接告诉我你的困惑,让我为你选择最合适的牌阵。

en: Help me make sense of the confusion I'm in right now.
How should I approach this choice?
What is likely to unfold next?
zh-CN: 帮我理清目前的混乱状况
告诉我接下来会发生什么

description.en: A simple and direct one-card reading. Instead of asking a strict yes-or-no question, try asking what you need to notice, shift, or understand right now.
description.zh-CN:
这个牌阵是最简单直接的指引,只用到一张塔罗牌。
建议避免单纯的"是/否"提问,而是用"我需要注意什么..."来获得更深层的当下指引。

interpretationInstruction.en:
The One Card Draw" .
- Card 1: The Insight regarding the specific topic.
Synthesis Goal: Do NOT answer with a simple 'Yes' or 'No'. Focus on the 'appropriateness' of the card drawn . Interpret the card as the specific attitude, perspective, or circumstance the seeker needs to be aware of right now to make the day or situation more rewarding .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
单张牌阵。
- 牌 1:当下最重要的核心提示。
综合目标:不要给简单的是/否结论。请解释这张牌所指向的关键态度、注意事项或行动方向,并与求问者问题直接关联。

en: What do I need to pay attention to here?
What attitude would serve me best today?
What insight is this situation offering me?
zh-CN: 关于这件事,我需要留意什么?
今天采取什么样的态度最有用?
这个问题能带给我什么启示?

description.en: A classic three-card spread for Past, Present, and Future. It works well when you want to understand a timeline, trace the roots of a situation, or see where things are heading.
description.zh-CN:
这是很经典的三张塔罗牌的牌阵,分别代表"过去、现在、未来"。
适合提问用来了解某个事件的时间线发展,或是探索某个问题的来龙去脉。

interpretationInstruction.en:
The Three Card Spread" .
- Card 1: Past (Recent occurrences/influences) .
- Card 2: Present (Current happenings) .
- Card 3: Future (Situation unfolding) .
Synthesis Goal: Distill the interpretation to the most important events or influences within the timeframe . Connect the cards linearly: explain how the recent Past shaped the Present, and how the Present momentum flows into the Future.
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
三张时间线牌阵。
- 牌 1:过去(近期影响与成因)。
- 牌 2:现在(当前主导能量)。
- 牌 3:未来(趋势与发展方向)。
综合目标:用连贯叙事说明过去如何塑造现在,以及现在如何推动未来。

en: What do I need to understand about this relationship?
How is my work likely to develop in the near future?
What is the past, present, and future of this situation?
zh-CN: 关于这段关系,我需要了解什么?
我的工作在未来一段时间会有什么发展?
这件事的过去、现在和未来是怎样的?

description.en: A three-card behavior pattern spread that reveals the situation, the role or persona you adopt, and the deeper cause behind it. It helps you understand your habitual reactions more clearly.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到三张塔罗牌的牌阵,分别代表情境(小阿卡纳)、人格(宫廷牌)和原因(大阿卡纳)。
适合提问用来了解自己在某类情境下的典型反应与行为模式,帮助你更好地认识自我。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Court Card Spread" .
- Card 1 (Pip): The Situation (Daily life trigger) .
- Card 2 (Court): The Persona (The mask/role you adopt) .
- Card 3 (Major): The Cause (Deep psychological root) .
Synthesis Goal: Strictly follow this narrative formula: "When [Card 1 Situation] arises, you become [Card 2 Persona] because of [Card 3 Cause]." Focus on the psychological shift and the underlying root cause .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
三张行为模式牌阵。
- 牌 1:情境。
- 牌 2:你呈现的角色/行为。
- 牌 3:背后真实驱动。
综合目标:揭示你在特定压力下的惯性反应,并给出可替代的更成熟应对方式。

en: What do I become when I am under pressure?
Why do I react this way in this kind of situation?
What is my usual pattern when handling everyday conflict?
zh-CN: 我在面对压力时会变成什么样?
为什么我在这种情况下会这样反应?
我处理日常冲突的典型模式是什么?

description.en: A clear decision-making spread that maps the current situation, what works against you, what helps you, and the final answer. Ideal when you need clarity before choosing.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到4张塔罗牌的牌阵,具有非常清晰的逻辑结构:现状、阻碍(Cons)、助力(Pro)以及最终的答案。
适合提问需要决策的情境,帮助你理清利弊得失,从而做出明智的选择。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Simple Four Card Spread" .
- Card 1: The Situation (Current reality/Relationship to question) .
- Card 2: Cons (Obstacles/What is against you) .
- Card 3: Pro (Helpful influences/What supports you) .
- Card 4: The Answer (The Outcome) .
Synthesis Goal: Perform a strategic analysis. Contrast the Cons (Card 2) against the Pros (Card 3) to explain why the current Situation (Card 1) evolves into the final Answer (Card 4) .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
四张决策牌阵。
- 牌 1:现状。
- 牌 2:阻碍(Cons)。
- 牌 3:助力(Pro)。
- 牌 4:结果/答案。
综合目标:对比阻碍与助力,解释现状为何会走向当前结果,并给出可执行建议。

en: How might this new romance develop over the next three months?
What do I need to know about my finances right now?
How should I make this decision?
zh-CN: 未来三个月我的新恋情会如何发展?
关于目前的财务状况,我需要知道什么?
我该如何做出这个决定?

description.en: A five-card spread with a hidden center card that reveals unseen motives, subconscious patterns, or missing factors. It is useful when you want the deeper truth beneath the surface.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到五张塔罗牌的牌阵,特色在于中间的"Hidden"牌,揭示了潜意识中你未察觉的驱动力。
适合提问需要深入了解现状全貌的情境,帮助你发现隐藏的影响因素。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Five Card Spread" .
- Card 1: Past (Emotional/Intellectual shaping) .
- Card 2: Present (Significant current influence) .
- Card 3: What's Hidden (Unconscious driving forces/Unknown aspects - Crucial) .
- Card 4: Advice (Action required to overcome negative hidden aspects or capitalize on positive ones) .
- Card 5: Outcome (Possibility dependent on following Advice) .
Synthesis Goal: The pivot point is Card 3 (Hidden). Reveal this unknown factor to the seeker, then explain how following the Advice (Card 4) allows them to navigate from the Present to the desired Outcome .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
五张深入牌阵。
- 牌 1:过去。
- 牌 2:现在。
- 牌 3:隐藏因素(关键)。
- 牌 4:建议行动。
- 牌 5:结果可能。
综合目标:聚焦第 3 张隐藏因素,说明其如何影响现状,并指出遵循建议后的变化路径。

en: What hidden influence am I missing in this situation?
What action would improve my current circumstances?
What do I most need to understand about where I am now?
zh-CN: 这件事背后有什么我没看到的隐性影响?
我应该采取什么行动来改善现状?
关于目前的处境,我需要知道什么?

description.en: A five-stage timeline spread that follows how a situation evolves across consecutive time points, such as days, weeks, or months. Helpful for planning and reading momentum over time.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到五张塔罗牌的牌阵,分别代表五个连续的时间节点(如未来5天、5周或5个月)。
适合查看事情随时间的演变趋势,帮助你做好长期规划和准备。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Timeline Spread" .
- Card 1: Time Unit 1 (The beginning/Current day) .
- Card 2: Time Unit 2 (Progression).
- Card 3: Time Unit 3 (Middle phase).
- Card 4: Time Unit 4 (Later phase).
- Card 5: Time Unit 5 (Culmination/Final outcome) .
Synthesis Goal: Read the cards as a chronological story or sequence of events . Identify the flow of energy—where it starts, how it develops, and where it peaks or resolves in the final unit.
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
时间轴牌阵。
- 牌 1-5:依次对应连续时间阶段(如未来 5 天/周/月)。
综合目标:按时间顺序解读能量如何演进,指出转折点、风险点与关键机会。

en: How will my work situation change over the next five months?
What should I watch for over the next five days?
How is this project likely to develop from here?
zh-CN: 未来五个月我的工作情况会如何变化?
接下来五天我需要注意什么?
这个项目接下来的发展趋势如何?

description.en: A five-dimension life scan covering emotions, money, mind, career, and spirit. It gives a broad overview of your current balance and shows where attention is most needed.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到五种不同塔罗牌花色的牌阵,全面扫描生活的五个维度(情感、财务、思维、事业和灵性)。
适合提问需要全方位了解当前生活状态的情境,帮助你找到各个维度的平衡点。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Mister Tarot's Five Dimensions Spread" .
- Card 1 (Cups): Relationships & Emotions .
- Card 2 (Pentacles): Finances, Assets & Physical Security .
- Card 3 (Swords): Mental State & Decision Making .
- Card 4 (Wands): Career, Energy & Work Effectiveness .
- Card 5 (Major Arcana): Spiritual Path & Higher Self .
Synthesis Goal: Provide a holistic life scan. Treat each card as a specific diagnosis for that 'dimension' of life. Check for harmony or conflict between the dimensions (e.g., career stress affecting relationships) .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
五维生活扫描牌阵。
- 牌 1:情感。
- 牌 2:财务。
- 牌 3:思维。
- 牌 4:事业。
- 牌 5:灵性。
综合目标:给出整体平衡评估,指出最需要优先调整的维度与现实行动。

en: What should be the center of my life next month?
Give me a full scan of my current energy.
How balanced are the different areas of my life right now?
zh-CN: 我下个月的生活重心应该放在哪里?
全面扫描我目前的能量状态。
我在生活各方面的平衡做得如何?

description.en: The classic Celtic Cross uses ten cards to examine a complex issue in depth. It is ideal when you need a comprehensive view of a major situation, along with its hidden pressures and likely outcome.
description.zh-CN:
这是经典的凯尔特十字牌阵,总共用到十张牌,提供对复杂问题的深入洞察。
适合提问需要全面分析某个重要议题的情境,帮助你理清思路,找到解决方案。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Mister Tarot's Celtic Cross (Modified)" .
- The Cross: 1.Issue, 2.Obstacle (Crosses 1), 3.Past (Top), 4.Present (Left), 5.Near Future (Bottom), 6.Far Future (Right) .
- The Staff: 7.Yourself (Attitude), 8.Environment (Support), 9.Hopes/Fears, 10.Outcome .
Synthesis Goal: First, analyze the 'Cross' to see the event flow (Issue -> Past -> Present -> Future). Then use the 'Staff' to analyze the seeker's agency. Contrast Card 9 (Hopes/Fears) with Card 10 (Outcome). Note: Card 1 has an overriding effect on the whole spread .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
凯尔特十字牌阵(10 张)。
- 核心:现状与挑战。
- 内圈:意识/潜意识、过去/未来。
- 外圈:自我、外在环境、希望与恐惧、最终趋势。
综合目标:先定义问题核心,再整合内外因素,形成完整的因果与走向判断。

en: What should I be aware of in this complex situation?
What does the bigger picture of my career look like over the next year?
What is the outcome of the path I am on now?
zh-CN: What should I be aware of regarding [complex situation]?
我未来一年的职业发展全貌是怎样的?
What is the outcome of my current path?

description.en: An eleven-card relationship spread that explores both sides of a connection, including hidden needs, strengths, blind spots, and the direction of the bond itself. It works for romance, family, friendship, or partnership.
description.zh-CN:
这是需要用到11张塔罗牌的牌阵,深入探索双方的潜意识、阻碍与优势。
提问不限于情感关系,也适用于合作伙伴、亲子关系等。可以换位思考,帮助你理解对方的视角与需求。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Mister Tarot's Relationship Spread" .
- Left Col (Seeker): 1.You Now, 2.Your Weakness, 3.Your Strength, 4.Your View .
- Right Col (Partner): 5.Them Now, 6.Their Weakness, 7.Their Strength, 8.Their View .
- Center (Bond): 9.Relationship Present, 10.Near Future, 11.Outcome .
Synthesis Goal: Compare parallel cards. Contrast 'Your View' (4) vs 'Their View' (8). Analyze how 'Your Weakness' (2) interacts with 'Their Strength' (7). Interpret the Center Column as the 'Third Entity'—the relationship itself .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
关系牌阵(11 张)。
- 覆盖双方表层状态、深层需求、关系动力与未来方向。
综合目标:同时看见双方立场与互动模式,指出误区、潜力与可改善的沟通/行动策略。

en: What is their truest feeling about this relationship right now?
What obstacle do we need to overcome together?
zh-CN: 对方目前对这段关系最真实的看法是什么?
我们未来的关系走向如何?
在这段关系中,我们需要克服什么阻碍?

description.en: A seven-card spread for goals, ambition, and execution. It highlights both the visible actions and the hidden psychological dynamics involved in making something real.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到七张塔罗牌的牌阵,深入分析实现目标过程中的心理与行动要素。
适合提问需要设定并实现具体目标的情境,帮助你识别关键的心理动力和提供实际的方法论。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Mister Tarot's Kicking Goals Spread" .
- Top Row: 1.Focus (Present), 3.Action (To stay true), 5.Helpful Influence.
- Middle Row: 2.Hidden Self (What you need to know), 4.Challenge (To avoid), 6.Inspiration (Motivation).
- Bottom: 7.Outcome (after 1 year) .
Synthesis Goal: Reveal the psychological gap. Contrast the Conscious efforts (Top Row) with the Subconscious/Hidden factors (Middle Row). Explain how aligning these leads to the Outcome .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
七张目标实现牌阵。
- 上层:当下焦点、行动方向、助力。
- 中层:隐藏自我、挑战、灵感动机。
- 下层:一年后的结果。
综合目标:对照"显性努力"与"隐性心理",说明怎样对齐两者以提升达成率。

en: How can I build a successful side business?
What deep psychological factor is blocking my goal?
What do I need to understand in order to make this wish real?
zh-CN: 我如何才能建立成功的副业?
阻碍我达成目标的深层心理因素是什么?
我需要知道什么才能实现这个愿望?

description.en: A fifteen-card wheel spread for the year ahead, including the central theme, major challenge, support, and a month-by-month forecast. Best for long-range planning and timing.
description.zh-CN:
这是用到十五张塔罗牌的环形牌阵,预测未来一年的逐月运势。
适合提问需要规划全年运势和重要时间节点的情境,帮助你把握节奏,优化决策。

interpretationInstruction.en:
Mister Tarot's Yearly Spread" .
- Center: 1.Trend (Overall focus), 2.Challenge (Left), 3.Helpful (Right) .
- Outer Ring: Cards 4-15 represent Month 1 to Month 12 (Clockwise) .
Synthesis Goal: Start by defining the 'Trend' (Card 1) as the year's theme. Contrast the Challenge (2) and Help (3). Then, weave the monthly cards into a narrative of seasonal progression .
interpretationInstruction.zh-CN:
年度轮盘牌阵(15 张)。
- 中央 3 张:年度主轴、挑战、助力。
- 外圈 12 张:按顺时针对应 1-12 月。
综合目标:先定全年主题,再串联每月节奏,指出关键月份与策略重点。

en: What does my year ahead look like?
Which months of the coming year will be the luckiest for me?
What are the biggest challenge and opportunity I will face this year?
zh-CN: 未来这一年我在哪些月份运气最好?
今年我面临的最大挑战和机遇是什么?
